title: SimpleChatKeys
description: This Fabric mod lets you use customizable placeholders in chat.
body:
## Info
This Fabric mod lets you use customizable placeholders in chat.

This mod requires the '[Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)' mod to work.

Placeholders:
- {LOC} -> Player location
- {POS} -> Player coordinates
- {DIM} -> Players dimension
- {BIOME} -> Player biome
- {NAME} -> Player name
- {UUID} -> Player UUID
- {HP} -> Player health
- {TIME} -> Real-life Time
- {DATE} -> Real-life Date


## Contact

If you encounter any issues or bugs, or have a
request for a new feature, please contact me via Discord or join my Discord-Server.

> My discord-name is **Losterixx**.

> My Discord-Server: [Link](https://discord.gg/gnGsUAwp76)
